# AnixOps Release - GitHub Secrets Configuration

## DEV Environment Secrets

Go to: Settings → Environments → DEV → Add secret

---

### ANDROID_KEYSTORE_BASE64

```

```

---

### ANDROID_KEY_ALIAS

```
anixops
```

---

### ANDROID_KEY_PASSWORD

```
<填写你的key密码>
```

---

### ANDROID_STORE_PASSWORD

```
<填写你的store密码>
```

---

## 运行发布步骤

1. 进入 GitHub 仓库
2. 点击 Actions 标签
3. 选择 "Build Release" 工作流
4. 点击 "Run workflow"
5. 填写参数:
   - Version: v1.0.0-rc.1
   - Environment: dev
6. 点击 "Run workflow"

---

|------|------|
| Android APK | anixops-v1.0.0-rc.1-android.apk |
| Android AAB | anixops-v1.0.0-rc.1-android.aab |

| Linux GUI | anixops-v1.0.0-rc.1-linux.tar.gz |
